title: ItemNBT
description: A Fabric mod development library for handling item NBTs in a smart way.
body:
## ItemNBT

Ease the process of handling item NBT data with a robust and easy-to-use serialization engine.

## Quick Guide

**If you're a player**, you're here because some other mod wants you to install ItemNBT, just download the mod's JAR and put it in your `mods` folder.

**If you're a modder**, [go to the wiki](https://github.com/RedGrapefruit09/ItemNBT/wiki) to learn how to integrate this library for your Minecraft mods.
